summary: Dynamic Pricing System Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: 7/7 UI verifications passed. All dynamic pricing features working correctly - admin can configure prices, and they appear dynamically in ProfilePage (Conto UP activation) and MerchantDashboard (menu scan).
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 pricing keys properly implemented (myu_chat_per_message, menu_scan_per_item, visura_scan, conto_up_activation)
Public pricing endpoint /api/admin/features/public/pricing works without auth
Admin pricing endpoint properly requires admin authentication (returns 403 for non-admin)
get_price() helper in admin_features.py correctly used by merchant_ai.py and sim.py
Frontend fetches pricing via featuresAPI.getPublicPricing() and displays dynamically
Pricing section placed correctly between feature toggles and API config sections
Orange 'Salva Prezzi' button matches design spec
Price inputs use step=0.01 for decimal precision

test_credentials.regular_user_no_sim: giulia.rossi@test.com / test123 (no SIM - shows activation price)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Pricing System fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/admin/features/public/pricing returns {myu_chat_per_message: 0.01, menu_scan_per_item: 0.01, visura_scan: 0, conto_up_activation: 15.99} - all numeric values in UP currency. 2) GET /api/admin/features/pricing (admin only) returns full pricing objects with labels. 3) PUT /api/admin/features/pricing accepts {key: newPrice} to update prices. 4) Admin Features page shows 'Prezzi Servizi (UP)' section with 4 number inputs and orange 'Salva Prezzi' button. 5) ProfilePage (for users without SIM) shows dynamic '15.99 UP' for Conto UP activation (fetched from featuresAPI.getPublicPricing). 6) MerchantDashboard shows '0.01 UP/piatto' badge and 'Costo: 0.01 UP per ogni piatto estratto' from dynamic pricing. 7) Existing feature toggles and API config sections still work correctly. 8) Non-admin users get 403 when trying to access admin pricing endpoints.

verified_features.GET /api/admin/features/public/pricing: PASS - Returns all 4 pricing keys as numeric values
verified_features.GET /api/admin/features/pricing (admin): PASS - Returns pricing with labels, currency
verified_features.PUT /api/admin/features/pricing (admin): PASS - Updates prices, changes reflect in public endpoint
verified_features.Frontend Admin Prezzi Servizi section: PASS - Shows 4 inputs with correct values
verified_features.Frontend Admin Salva Prezzi button: PASS - Orange button, updates prices with toast
verified_features.Frontend ProfilePage dynamic price: PASS - Shows '15.99 UP' for Conto UP activation
verified_features.Frontend MerchantDashboard menu price: PASS - Shows '0.01 UP/piatto' badge and cost text
